title: wolfhsm: WolfHsmError::Ffi overloaded for Rust-side input validation
description: Rust-side argument validation errors (port > 32767, data too large for u16, bad key length) are returned as WolfHsmError::Ffi { code: -1, func: "..." }. Ffi implies a C library returned a nonzero code; using it for Rust validation errors makes them indistinguishable from real FFI failures. Add a separate WolfHsmError::BadArgs or InvalidInput variant for pre-FFI validation failures.
